headline: Why Western Digital (WDC) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of leading data storage manufacturer Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) jumped 4.5% in the morning session after Morgan Stanley raised its price target on the stock, citing robust demand for hard disk drives (HDDs).

headline: Micron Is Slumping and Rival’s $10 Billion US Listing Won’t Help
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Micron Technology Inc. is having a tough few weeks in the stock market, and the upcoming US listing of South Korean rival SK Hynix Inc. will only add to its challenges. Shares of Micron, the third largest maker of memory chips in the world, blasted out of the gate to start the year, soaring almost 50% in January for the second best performance in the S&P 500 Index.
